feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Antman and Red entered Pokemon Tower's first floor after Bill confirmed the Lavender signal.

feed.speaker: Red
feed.text: Red stayed close at the tower entrance and warned that this is not a normal trainer route.

feed.speaker: Bill
feed.text: Bill detected the Echo Flute distorting inside Pokemon Tower, as if the signal is being bent by grief and dream pressure.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Team Moonlight pressure is strongest around the first-floor memorials, masking whatever is happening higher in the tower.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: A Rocket grunt is watching the tower stairs, proving Giovanni's network is tracking the same disturbance.

feed.speaker: Red
feed.text: Cubone and Mr. Fuji are now tied to the Lavender mystery instead of being a separate side story.

feed.speaker: Bill
feed.text: Bill marked the Silph Scope as the needed tool before Antman can safely push deeper into Pokemon Tower.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: The deeper Pokemon Tower path is locked until the Silph Scope thread is resolved.
